article_title: Burnaby Council — 9.1. SU 2025 Open Resolutions and Bylaw Tracking 2026-01-27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Burnaby's 2025 Resolutions and Bylaw Progress Report
briefs.summary: Council is set to receive a status update on all open 2025 resolutions and bylaws — tracking which city directives are completed, in progress, or cancelled. Starting in 2026, these updates will shift from quarterly to twice a year.
briefs.action_required: No action needed — monitor future updates for bylaws that may affect your business.
